ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., Hockey, Football) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., National, Club) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match occurred */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular season, playoff, friendly) */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went into overtime */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went to penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "pts_avg" REAL /* Average points scored by the team */,
  "total_pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the ranking is applicable */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league for which the ranking is applicable */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ranking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the competitive season */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport for the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league associated with the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being analyzed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight derived from the match data */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the analysis is applicable */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league for which the analysis is applicable */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., performance, strategy, trends) */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific metrics and values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport the league represents */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leagues" (
  "team_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team in the league */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the team participated in the league */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the team joined the league */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the team left the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leagues_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leagues_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leagues_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being commented on */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the feedback is applicable */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league for which the feedback is applicable */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or tournament */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport for the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league associated with the event */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the event */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the event */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the event's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the event's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)
